name: java
description: Java development plugin with practical skills for syntax boundaries, language design, testing workflows, dependency decisions, performance analysis, and JDTLS-assisted editing.
author: ririnto

interface.shortDescription: Practical Java syntax, design, testing, performance, and JDTLS workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared, skill-first Java plugin for syntax boundaries, language design, dependency decisions, test-driven development, performance review, and JDTLS-assisted editing across Claude Code and Codex-style runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Explain whether this Java syntax is valid on Java 17 or Java 21, and what the safest fallback shape is.
Review this Java API design for immutability, exceptions, naming, and public contract clarity.
Design a JUnit 5 test strategy for this Java change and choose the smallest correct scope.
Help me use JDTLS to inspect, refactor, or diagnose this Java source file.
